NanoCell.name: NanoCell
NanoCell.desc: A nano-tech healing capsule. Restores 20 HP.

HyperCell.name: HyperCell
HyperCell.desc: Atlas Valley's best healing tech. Restores 100 HP.

UltraCell.name: UltraCell
UltraCell.desc: Fully restores HP and cures status.

AEONball.name: AEONball
AEONball.desc: A high-tech capture sphere for wild AEONs.

Revive Chip.name: Revive Chip
Revive Chip.desc: Revives a fainted AEON with half HP.

Style Capsule.name: Style Capsule
Style Capsule.desc: Atlas Barber exclusive. Boosts all stats by 1 stage.

Style Tonic.name: Style Tonic
Style Tonic.desc: Atlas Barber exclusive. Boosts Speed by 5 permanently.

Solar Shard.name: Solar Shard
Solar Shard.desc: A crystallized solar panel fragment. Activates Solar Beam in one turn.

Wind Core.name: Wind Core
Wind Core.desc: From Atlas Valley's wind turbines. Boosts Flying-type moves.

PokeFlute 2.0.name: PokeFlute 2.0
PokeFlute 2.0.desc: A digital instrument. Wakes sleeping AEONs.

Atlas Key.name: Atlas Key
Atlas Key.desc: Opens locked areas in Atlas Valley.
